title: Brazilian Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful Brazilian-inspired skillet dish made with great ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the pressed and drained tofu to the skillet and cook until lightly browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the fresh spinach leaves to the skillet and cook until wilted, about 1-2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the tofu is golden brown and the spinach is heated through.
